name: Vehicle Creation Process
description: Complete process for creating and registering a new fleet vehicle

steps.title: VIN Verification and Validation
steps.description: Verify and validate vehicle identification number

substeps.title: Verify VIN format and structure
substeps.description: Confirm VIN follows standard 17-character format

substeps.title: Decode VIN information
substeps.description: Extract make, model, year, and other vehicle details from VIN

substeps.title: Check VIN against national databases
substeps.description: Verify VIN is not reported stolen or has liens

substeps.title: Photograph VIN plate
substeps.description: Take clear photo of VIN plate on dashboard and door jamb

steps.title: Vehicle Registration and Documentation
steps.description: Gather and verify all required vehicle documentation

substeps.title: Verify vehicle title or MCO
substeps.description: Confirm clear title or manufacturer's certificate of origin

substeps.title: Complete vehicle registration
substeps.description: Process registration with appropriate state DMV

substeps.title: Obtain license plates
substeps.description: Secure appropriate fleet or commercial license plates

substeps.title: File registration documents
substeps.description: Organize and file all registration paperwork

steps.title: Insurance Verification and Setup
steps.description: Establish insurance coverage for new vehicle

substeps.title: Add vehicle to fleet insurance policy
substeps.description: Contact insurance provider to add vehicle to coverage

substeps.title: Verify adequate coverage levels
substeps.description: Confirm liability, comprehensive, and collision coverage

substeps.title: Obtain insurance identification cards
substeps.description: Get physical and digital insurance cards for vehicle

substeps.title: File insurance documentation
substeps.description: Store insurance documents in vehicle and fleet records

steps.title: Equipment Assignment and Installation
steps.description: Install and configure required fleet equipment

substeps.title: Install GPS tracking system
substeps.description: Mount and configure GPS tracking device

substeps.title: Install communication equipment
substeps.description: Set up radio, phone mount, and other communication tools

substeps.title: Install safety equipment
substeps.description: Add first aid kit, emergency equipment, and safety materials

substeps.title: Load standard tools and supplies
substeps.description: Stock vehicle with required tools and operational supplies

steps.title: Final Vehicle Inspection
steps.description: Complete comprehensive inspection before fleet deployment

substeps.title: Perform safety inspection
substeps.description: Check brakes, lights, tires, and all safety systems

substeps.title: Test all installed equipment
substeps.description: Verify GPS, communication, and safety equipment function properly

substeps.title: Document vehicle condition
substeps.description: Record initial condition with photos and notes

substeps.title: Create vehicle file
substeps.description: Establish complete vehicle record in fleet management system

options.label: Vehicle Created and Ready for Assignment
Requires Supervisor Approval for Fleet Addition
